title: Relative time resolution
description: User dumps several interactions using only relative time expressions. Tests that the agent anchors each on 'now' and resolves it to a concrete date.

turns.content: Catching up on notes. Yesterday I had lunch with Sofia Reyes. This morning I called Dan Park. And about two weeks ago I met Aisha Khan at a workshop.
Logged three: lunch with Sofia Reyes (yesterday, Jun 8), a call with Dan Park (this morning, Jun 9), and meeting Aisha Khan at a workshop (~two weeks ago, around May 26). Want to add detail to any?
Just note that Aisha's workshop was about design systems.
Added 'design systems' to the Aisha Khan workshop. Done.

people.name: Aisha Khan
people.notes: Met at a design-systems workshop about two weeks ago.

conversation: The agent resolves each relative time to a concrete date in its reply.
'about two weeks ago' is approximate; any date within a few days of 2026-05-26 is acceptable.
db: Dates: yesterday = 2026-06-08, this morning/today = 2026-06-09, ~two weeks ago is approximately 2026-05-26.
